chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D- 3579 of 2024 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 15637/2024. (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 06.08.2024. Ms. Lubna Pervez, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Syed Amir Ali Shah, Advocate for Respondents No.3. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ________ This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceeding initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before Commissioner Inland Revenue, (Appeals-III) Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner to decide the pending Appeal(s) of the Petitioner(s), to which learned Assistant Attorney General as well as Counsel for Respondent concede. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals-III) Karachi to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas, during such period the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with listed application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
